instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master` as `dc62abb`.

Resolved the about-page conflict, preserved the “off the job market” change, and verified a clean working tree with no conflict markers. Jekyll was unavailable, so a full site build could not run.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- recent reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -20

git show --stat --oneline --decorate 74e4785 && printf '
-- commit details/diff --
' && git show --format=fuller --find-renames 74e4785 && printf '
-- master-only commit --
' && git show --stat --oneline d7d3e4b && g

git show d7d3e4b -- _includes/about.md && printf '
-- merge --
' && git merge --no-edit 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 || true && git status --short && if test -f _includes/about.md; then printf '
-- about a

printf '%s\n' '-- Gemfile --'; cat Gemfile; printf '%s\n' '-- build --'; if command -v bundle >/dev/null 2>&1; then bundle exec jekyll build; elif command -v jekyll >/dev/null 2>&1; then jekyll build; else echo 'No Jekyl

git diff --check HEAD^1 HEAD && ! git grep -nE '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' -- . ':!*.bib' && grep -F 'Postdoc @ Stanford' _layouts/default.html && grep -F 'I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS.' _includes/about

sed -i 's/[[:space:]]*$//' _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md && git commit --amend --no-edit && git diff --check HEAD^1 HEAD && ! git grep -nE '^(<<<<<<<|=======|>>>>>>>)' -- . ':!*.bib' && grep -F 'Postdo
